name: 17q25_3_subtelomeric_SD
description: 17qter subtelomeric SD cap — small SD modules at the chromosome 17 telomere, harbouring KRT-family and SECTM1 paralogs. T2T-CHM13 resolved the 17qter SD content fully; GRCh38 captures ~80%.

architecture.internal_structure: Telomere-adjacent SD blocks of ~20-50 kb at ~95-97% identity; tandem KRT and SECTM1 paralog cassettes; some shared with other acrocentric telomeres.
